content: Conference talk 'Fixing Freight Procurement', Manifest (Las Vegas) 2022. Speaker: Priya Anand, affiliation FreightWaves / TMS vendor ecosystem — dated evidence of freight-procurement experience.

Patent US11500000 'Dynamic carrier rate negotiation', named inventor Marcus Ohl, assignee a TMS vendor, filed 2021. Together with the Manifest 2022 talk, dated evidence supporting the founders' combined ~9 years in freight/TMS.

Parcelmind public integration docs: live API integrations with MercuryGate and Blue Yonder TMS, matching the deck's product claims. Verified against product documentation; no customer-side verification available.

Market note: equivalent freight quotes across carriers vary severalfold; quote comparison and negotiation at mid-size shippers is manual and slow. Logistics sales cycles are long but contracts are sticky once integrated. Incumbent tooling serves enterprise shippers; the mid-market is underserved. Single source.
